title: How Can I view the item card from the Mobile App (iOS phone or IPAD)
excerpt: Does anyone know if there is a way to view the item cards using the Mobile App (for iOS or IPads). We have a lot of data we collect on a board and am trying to limit the scrolling on the mobile experience? If the item ca…

posts.author: EPMLIving (EPMLiving)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does anyone know if there is a way to view the item cards using the Mobile App (for iOS or IPads). We have a lot of data we collect on a board and am trying to limit the scrolling on the mobile experience? If the item cards are not available on the mobile app, has anyone found any good workarounds?
Thank you!

posts.author: AK43040 (Adam)
posts.cookedHtml: Would like to know as well. One of the main complaints my team has shared with me, and specifically iOS.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @EPMLIving and @AK43040,

Apologies for the delay in getting back to you! Thanks for your question

At this time, I am afraid the item card feature is not currently supported in our mobile app. That being said, we will circle back with our team on any development updates, and get back to you if we hear any further insight.

Thanks for your understanding in advance!

Best,
Bianca
